name: PR Input validates and rejects malformed GitHub URLs
description: When a user submits a URL that is not a valid GitHub PR URL, the app shows a red validation error below the input and does not start analysis.

planSteps.description: Type 'not-a-url' into the PR URL input field
A red error message appears below the input field indicating the URL is invalid; the spinner is not shown and no review result appears
A red error message is shown indicating the URL must contain /pull/ and no loading spinner appears
